text: The QComics package is designed to provide a quick overview of the quality of a metabolomics or lipidomics study.
source_excerpt:
The goal of the `QComics` package is to have a quick overview of the
quality of a metabolomics or lipidomics study.

super_pattern.subject: QComics package
super_pattern.relation: designed to provide quick overview of study quality

text: QComics requires a pooled sample (QCpool) to be measured in regular intervals during one or more sequences.
source_excerpt:
For this, a pooled sample
(QCpool) needs to measured in regular intervals during one or more
sequences.

super_pattern.subject: QComics package
super_pattern.relation: requires pooled sample measured at regular intervals
